description: scattered process.env reads with manual validation
Zod schema validates all env vars at build time

ruleTitle: Client Vars Must Use NEXT_PUBLIC_ Prefix
description: missing NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix — value is undefined in browser

ruleTitle: Client Vars Must Use NEXT_PUBLIC_ Prefix
description: NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix makes value available client-side

code:
# .env.example
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUI_NETWORK=testnet
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUI_FULLNODE_URL=https://fullnode.testnet.sui.io
# Server-only — do NOT commit real values
# ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=
# DATABASE_PASSWORD=
description: secrets documented as comments with empty placeholders
build fails if optional ANALYTICS_ID is missing
.optional() allows build to succeed without analytics

ruleTitle: Never Hardcode Network Names or RPC URLs
Never Hardcode Network Names or RPC URLs
description: network and RPC URL read from validated config

ruleTitle: Publish Config Uses Server-Only Env Names
description: publish config incorrectly reads server values from NEXT_PUBLIC_* names

ruleTitle: Publish Config Uses Server-Only Env Names
description: publish config keeps server-only values unprefixed
publish config cannot validate localnet even though publish scripts support it
publish config covers localnet alongside the shared remote networks

ruleTitle: Publish Schema Keeps Mode-Specific Fields Optional
code:
const envSchema = z.object({
  SUI_NETWORK: z.enum(['mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet', 'localnet']),
  SUI_FULLNODE_URL: z.url(),
  ADMIN_ADDRESS: z.string(),
  ADMIN_SECRET_KEY: z.string(),
  MOVE_PACKAGE_PATH: z.string(),
})
description: forces both deploy modes to configure every signing field globally

ruleTitle: Publish Schema Keeps Mode-Specific Fields Optional
code:
const envSchema = z.object({
  SUI_NETWORK: z.enum(['mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet', 'localnet']),
  SUI_FULLNODE_URL: z.url(),
  ADMIN_ADDRESS: z.string().optional(),
  ADMIN_SECRET_KEY: z.string().optional(),
  MOVE_PACKAGE_PATH: z.string().optional(),
})
description: schema leaves mode-specific values optional so deploy scripts can enforce only what they need

ruleTitle: Use publish ENV Instead of clientConfig
description: publish code imports the client-only dapp config module

ruleTitle: Use publish ENV Instead of clientConfig
description: publish code reads from the publish-side server ENV module
